definition: Technical documentation, model cards, system design records.
Mandatory registration with a state or federal registry.
Algorithmic impact assessment, DPIA, or AI risk assessment before deployment.
Bias audit or discrimination testing of AI system outputs.
Adversarial/red-team testing or safety evaluation before deployment.
Independent third-party audit or certification of an AI system.
Reporting AI incidents, breaches, or safety failures to a regulator.
Retention of logs, training data documentation, or decision records.
Disclosure or notice to individuals that AI is being used.
Labeling or watermarking of AI-generated content.
Requirement for human oversight or appeal of AI-driven decisions.
Individual right to opt out of AI processing or profiling.
Individual right to explanation or meaningful information about an AI decision.
Required staff or operator training on AI use, bias, or safety.
Self-certification, conformity declaration, or CE-marking equivalent.
Periodic compliance reporting submitted to an agency or regulator.
Absolute prohibition on a specific AI use or practice.
Opt-in or explicit consent required before AI use or data processing.
Data quality, lineage, or data management requirements for AI training/operation.
Cybersecurity, access controls, or data security requirements for AI systems.
Ongoing risk monitoring, mitigation plan, or continuous risk management program.
